description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a roughly spherical form and a rugged, natural surface. Its exterior is characterized by a mix of rounded and angular protrusions, with subtle indentations and shallow pits scattered across its surface. The coloration is predominantly a light beige to grayish-tan, with some areas appearing slightly darker due to natural shading and textural variation. The stone's surface is matte and visibly rough, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time, possibly in an outdoor urban or park setting. There are no visible carvings, artificial markings, or signs of recent cutting, indicating it is likely a naturally weathered boulder. Its size and mass would make it a significant obstacle or barrier in an urban environment, suitable for use as a landscape feature or informal seating.
description: A large, roughly spherical, beige-gray stone with a rugged, weathered surface and natural textural variations. Its irregular form and matte finish suggest long-term exposure to outdoor elements.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest, most rounded face of the stone, with several shallow pits and a generally bulbous appearance.
description_view_1: This side reveals a more vertical, slightly flattened face with deeper creases and a less rounded profile compared to other views.
description_view_2: Here, the stone appears more symmetrical, with a central bulge and subtle surface undulations, giving it a balanced look.
description_view_3: This angle highlights a more angular, protruding section on the lower right, with visible roughness and minor surface irregularities.
attribute_location: urban park, landscaped plaza, or roadside verge
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and subtle pitting with no artificial carvings or regular veining; natural textural variation dominates.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with minor surface pitting and rounded edges, indicating prolonged exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural landscaping or contrasts with paved surfaces; may be partially surrounded by grass, soil, or mulch.
